name: promptshield
description: 🛡️ PromptShield — rule-based prompt-injection scanner and runtime action inspector. Unit-tested, CI-verified prototype.

name: standup-liar
description: Prototype UI demo exploring standup generation from GitHub activity; not presented as a production integration.

name: mcpguard-lite
description: 🔍 mcpguard-lite — static risk analyzer for MCP tools/list manifests: capability risks and missing declared controls.

name: approveops
description: ✅ approveops — human-in-the-loop approval queue for risky agent actions with transactional audit writes.

name: agentmap
description: 🗺️ agentmap — AI-agent inventory with explainable risk scoring from declared permissions. Reporting, not enforcement.

name: churn-autopsy
description: Prototype UI demo exploring how churn evidence could be organized and explained for B2B SaaS teams.

name: tech-debt-ledger
description: Prototype UI demo for tracking technical debt as an estimated financial liability.

name: cloud-shame
description: Prototype UI demo for presenting potential cloud-cost waste across AWS, GCP, or Azure.

name: proposal-spy
description: Prototype UI demo for organizing lost-deal evidence and competitor patterns.

name: meeting-receipt
description: Prototype UI demo for presenting meeting duration, attendees, estimated cost, and a generated summary.

name: deprecation-clock
description: Prototype UI demo for dependency deprecation and maintenance tracking.

name: velocity-truth
description: Prototype UI demo for presenting DORA-style engineering delivery metrics.
